toolPurpose: Retrieve complete file contents and structure including pages, frames, components, and design tokens. Returns metadata about the file hierarchy and all design elements.

file_key.description: Unique file key/ID from Figma (found in file URL as /file/{file_key}/)

version.description: Specific version ID to retrieve (defaults to latest version if not specified)

depth.description: Depth of node structure to retrieve (default: 1, higher values include nested children)

geometry.description: Include geometry information (coordinates, dimensions) for all nodes

toolPurpose: Retrieve specific nodes from a file by ID. Use to fetch detailed information about individual components, frames, or text layers without loading the entire file.

ids.description: Array of node IDs to retrieve (e.g., ['0:1', '1:5', '2:12'])

version.description: Specific version ID to retrieve from

geometry.description: Include geometry information (coordinates, dimensions) for nodes

toolPurpose: Retrieve all comments and feedback threads on a file. Returns resolved and unresolved comments with author information and timestamps.

page_size.description: Number of comments per page for pagination (default: 30, max: 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for retrieving subsequent pages of comments

resolved.description: Filter to show only resolved comments (true), unresolved (false), or all (omit)

toolPurpose: Export images from a file for specific nodes. Returns direct download URLs for PNG or SVG exports of design elements.

ids.description: Array of node IDs to export as images

scale.description: Scale factor for export (1, 2, 3, 4, etc. - default: 1)

version.description: Specific version ID to export from

toolPurpose: List all projects within a team. Returns project metadata including names, IDs, and last modified dates for navigation and project organization.

team_id.description: Unique team ID from Figma (found in team settings)

page_size.description: Number of projects per page for pagination (default: 50, max: 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for retrieving subsequent pages of projects
